name: Fruit-Sweetened Strawberry Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium pan, combine the sliced strawberries, apple-grape sweetener, water, and orange juice. Bring to a boil over medium heat, then reduce the heat slightly and cook at a low boil for 10 to 15 minutes until very thick. Stir often. (To test for gelling, place about 1/2 teaspoon jam on a chilled saucer and refrigerate for 1 minute. If it wrinkles when touched after cooling, it is ready.) Skim the foam from the top of the mixture.
2. Transfer to a bowl, let cool, cover, and refrigerate.
